name: Creamy Ham Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam cauliflower until tender (do not overcook) and rinse with cold water.
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan and stir in the flour until smooth.
3. Add the milk slowly, stirring constantly. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens.
4. Add the cheese and sour cream and continue cooking until the cheese is melting, stirring constantly.
5. Add ham, mushrooms, and cauliflower.
6. To freeze, cool and seal in plastic freezer bags in family-sized portions.
7. To serve, place in a casserole dish and heat (in oven or microwave) until bubbling. Serve over hot cooked rice.
8. Yield: 6 - 8 servings.
